telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 31, 2026 Markets displayed cautious optimism as geopolitical tensions eased, but underlying inflation concerns and crypto weakness kept risk appetite in check. The elevated VIX at 25.25 alongside recovery-phase positioning suggests investors are navigating between improving sentiment and persistent macro uncertainties around growth and pricing pressures.
